name: Bookmark Manager
description: Manage bookmarks and tab sessions locally with search, quick save, and cleanup tools.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://www.google.com https://*.gstatic.com; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';
